pages.title: Organic Black Tea – Zen Rojas
pages.meta_description: Bold Flavor, Mindful Energy Savor the rich, full-bodied taste of Organic Black Tea, crafted from the finest leaves sourced from Sri Lanka and India. Ethically grown and naturally caffeinated, this traditional tea delivers a lively flavor perfect for mindful mornings or vibrant afternoons.

pages.title: Bodyguard Organic Tea – Zen Rojas
pages.meta_description: Fortify Your Wellness, Mindfully Support your immune system and overall well-being with Organic Bodyguard Tea, a carefully crafted blend of organic herbs and botanicals. Naturally caffeinated and ethically sourced, this tea delivers both nourishment and a calming, flavorful experience.

pages.title: Zen Rojas Loose Leaf Samplers
pages.meta_description: Discover the Essence of Zen Rojas Not sure which Zen Rojas tea will become your favorite? Our convenient sample sizes make it easy to explore our premium blends without the commitment of a full bag. Perfect for discovering new favorites, sharing mindful gifts, or bringing your ritual wherever life takes you.   What's I

pages.title: Organic Sleep Tea – Zen Rojas
pages.meta_description: Drift Into Restful Nights Sip, relax, and let go. Our Organic Sleep Tea combines chamomile, lemon balm, passionflower, lavender, and skullcap to support peaceful, restorative sleep.

pages.title: Tea Bags – Zen Rojas
pages.meta_description: Your Perfect Brew, Made Simple Zen Rojas Tea Bags are designed to be simple, accessible, and enjoyable. These easy-to-use tea bags allow you to fill your own loose leaf blends, giving you full control over strength, flavor, and personal preference without the mess or complexity often associated with loose leaf brewing.

technical_checks.detail: At least one rendered page exposed a title.
At least one rendered page exposed a meta description.
No JSON-LD found in rendered pages.
31 images without alt text in rendered samples.
Navigation timing collected from rendered pages.

limits_known_gaps: Artifact collection only; no audit report, proposed experiments, or competitor analysis generated.
Rendered crawl is intentionally bounded to representative storefront surfaces rather than the full site.
Screenshots and DOM extraction depend on pages that are reachable from this runtime without manual authentication.
Rough browser timing is based on Playwright navigation timing and is not a Lighthouse performance audit.
Broken-link checks are sampled from discovered internal links to keep the crawl bounded.
